name: fs-review
description: Technical proof and review of financial statement packages — commercial (ASC/FASB), nonprofit (ASC 958), governmental (GASB/ACFR/Single Audit), and employee benefit plans (ERISA/ASC 962-960-965). One orchestrator skill + shared procedure modules + deterministic math/extraction scripts + industry overlays (construction). Math, cross-reference, and disclosure review before QC.
